description: Lists Coordination Issues associated with the specified Project.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Elements per page

parameters.name: filters[assignee_company_id][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching assignee vendor companies.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching assignees.

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching User IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_from][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching creation source.

parameters.name: filters[ids][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching ids.

parameters.name: filters[location_id][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching locations.

parameters.name: filters[include_sublocations]
parameters.description: Use together with `filters[location_id]`

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with the matching search query. The search is performed on title and issue number.

parameters.name: filters[coordination_issue_file_id][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with the exact coordination issue file.

parameters.name: filters[status][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching status.

parameters.name: filters[issue_type][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching issue_type.

parameters.name: filters[priority][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching priority.

parameters.name: filters[trade_id][]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching trades.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) within a specific updated at iso8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[due_date]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) within a specific due date iso8601 date range.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) within a specific created at iso8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort item(s) by an attribute. The default sort is ascending. To sort in descending order, prepend the sort value with a hyphen character '-'

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The compact view contains only ids.
The normal view is a subset of the response shown below, and does not include attachments, viewpoints, linked items and updated_by
The extended view contains the...

parameters.name: viewpoint_format
parameters.description:
Specify viewpoint data format. This parameter functions only when the query parameter view is 'extended'
The default format returns the viewpoint content as saved.
The procore format returns the vi...

parameters.name: filters[overdue]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching Overdue.

parameters.name: filters[document_container_id][]
parameters.description: Filter Coordination Issues by document container ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[document_revision_id][]
parameters.description: Filter Coordination Issues by document revision ID(s).

parameters.name: save_sticky_filters
parameters.description: Persists filter parameters for the requesting user and project.

403.description: User does not have permission to view Coordination Issues
